title: Task 1: Expand StrategyMap Schema
description: Add background/backdrop/pragmatic_composition to strategy enum, add backdrop_variant and element_layout fields

title: Task 2: Expand ImageManifest Schema
description: Add detected_positions, element_id, placement_zone to image manifest schema

title: Task 3: Expand Strategy Classification
description: Update classify_slide_strategy to return 'background' for dense content slides, update overrides logic

title: Task 4: Add get_element_layout() function with 5 templates
description: Add element layout template library to src/slide_prompt_composer.py with 5 templates: three_across, two_column, grid_2x2, process_flow, hub_and_spoke

title: Task 5: Add select_backdrop_variant() function
description: Add backdrop_variant selection to slide_prompt_composer.py with visual rhythm cycling

title: Task 6: Update assemble_brief for new strategies
description: Update assemble_brief() signature to accept backdrop_variant and element_layout params, add text_instruction logic for new strategies

title: Task 7: Expand Assembler Strategy Routing
description: Create strategy-map fixture, add test, expand build_deck.js routing stubs, expand QA routing

title: Task 8: Implement buildBackgroundSlide with 5 Template Zones
description: Add test, implement buildBackgroundSlide function with left_panel/right_panel/bottom_bar/top_band/center_float zones

title: Task 9: Implement split_element_briefs
description: Add split_element_briefs() to slide_prompt_composer.py for pragmatic composition multi-image generation

title: Task 10: buildPragmaticSlide — multi-image element assembly
description: Add findSlideImages helper and buildPragmaticSlide to assembler; update pragmatic_composition routing

title: Task 12: Implement buildBackdropSlide
description: Add buildBackdropSlide() to assembler with vision-detected positions + fallback to prescribed positions. Tests: test_build_deck_backdrop_with_detected_positions, test_build_deck_backdrop_falls_back_to_prescribed

title: Task 13: QA checks AP-27 and AP-28
description: Add check_element_layout (AP-27) and check_vision_confidence (AP-28) to src/qa/checks/element_layout.py and wire into run_qa.py

title: Task 14: Integration tests for new rendering strategies
description: Create tests/test_integration_rendering.py with ollama-tagged tests for background and pragmatic_composition strategies

title: Generate all images (17 total, Ollama x/z-image-turbo:fp8)
description: Full render: slides 1,13. Background: slides 2,7,12. Backdrop scene: slides 5,10. Pragmatic bg+elements: slides 9,11. Diagrams: slides 3,6 if missing.

title: Vision analysis for backdrop slides 5 and 10
description: Read slide-05-scene.png and slide-10-scene.png, detect element positions, write to draft-state.json

title: Build image manifest
description: Write image-manifest.json with all 17 images including detected_positions for backdrop slides

title: Assemble deck and review all layouts
description: Run build_deck.js, review all 5 strategy types, iterate positions until correct

title: Run QA and finalize
description: python3 -m src.qa.run_qa, fix critical issues, mark complete

title: Fix slide 14 contrast and re-run QA
description: Slide 14 text is 6.4:1 vs deep teal bg, needs white text. Re-assemble and re-run QA. Expect pass_with_warnings once DPI/false-positive contrast are excluded.

title: phase_3_e4_persona_docs: academic_figure recipe in narrative-architect + smartart-selector deferral
description: Plan §6.3 E4 — add academic-figure annotation guidance to narrative-architect SKILL.md and rule in smartart-selector.md preferring academic_figure strategy over bar/line_chart for paper-quality figures.
